allow: Bash("c:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -e "USE boomeritems; SELECT id, name, LEFT(img, 50) as img_preview FROM products WHERE img IS NULL OR img = '''' OR img LIKE ''data:image%'' LIMIT 10;")

Bash("c:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -e "USE boomeritems; SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN img LIKE ''data:image%'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as base64_count, SUM(CASE WHEN img IS NULL OR img = '''' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_count FROM products;")
Bash("c:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -e "USE boomeritems; SELECT id, name, img FROM products WHERE name LIKE ''%TEST4%'' OR name LIKE ''%PORSCHE%'' OR name LIKE ''%CITROEN%'' LIMIT 5;")
Bash("c:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -e "USE boomeritems; SELECT name, img FROM products WHERE name LIKE ''%CITROEN%'' OR name LIKE ''%TEST4%'';")
